overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a character in a long coat walking along a scenic cobblestone path beside railway tracks. The environment features rocky cliffs, stone retaining walls, and distant mountains with atmospheric lighting and a muted, desaturated color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone walkway between railway tracks and solid stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside railway tracks, moving through a narrow corridor between rocky cliff and stone wall

notable_agents.action: character in green coat leaning against stone wall, looking out at the view, visible briefly around 15 seconds

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the walking path
tall continuous wall made of dark stone blocks
steep layered rock formation rising above the tracks
irregular cobblestone walking surface between tracks and wall
hazy mountain peaks visible in the background
green coniferous trees growing atop the rocky cliff

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by railway tracks on the left and a solid stone retaining wall on the right. Rocky cliffs rise above the tracks, topped with pine trees, while distant mountains loom ahead. Around the 15-second mark, an NPC in a green coat appears briefly, leaning against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic lakeside walkway with perforated stone wall overlooking water

events.description: solid stone wall transitions to wall with regular openings revealing lake water and mountain views beyond

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the scenery opens up, revealing water views through gaps in the retaining wall

entered.detail: calm water visible through rectangular gaps in the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the solid stone wall gives way to a perforated structure with regular openings, revealing a lake and expansive mountain views beyond. The path remains cobblestone, but the enclosed feeling opens up to a more scenic, waterside atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow railway path that transforms from a confined stone corridor into an expansive lakeside vista. It begins with the character walking on cobblestones flanked by railway tracks and a solid stone retaining wall, with rocky cliffs and pine trees looming overhead. As the journey progresses, the camera passes an NPC in a green coat leaning against the wall before the environment begins to open up. The solid stone structure then shifts into a perforated wall with regular openings, gradually revealing a shimmering lake and distant mountains. The scene finally expands from the enclosed walkway into a scenic, waterside atmosphere as the view broadens across the landscape.
